G7 Ministers Back Capping Russian Oil in Move to Limit Moscow's Revenue

Finance ministers of the world's leading advanced economies agreed to the plan in an effort to drain Moscow's war chest.

The proposal faces considerable obstacles and is likely to intensify the confrontation between Russia and Europe and the U.S.

Russia Will Not Restart Gas Flow to Germany as Planned

Gazprom said the Nord Stream 1 pipeline would remain closed, deepening Europe's energy crisis ahead of winter.

A U.N. nuclear watchdog inspecting the Zaporizhzhia plant warned that fighting around the site posed a grave risk.
